overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text { minimize } & v _ {0} \\ \text { subject   to } & v _ {\mathcal {I} _ {1} (\sigma_ {1})} - \sum_ {I ^ {\prime} \in \mathcal {I} _ {1} (\mathrm{Ext} _ {1} (\sigma_ {1}))} v _ {I ^ {\prime}} \geq \sum_ {\sigma_ {2} \in \Sigma_ {2}} g _ {1} (\sigma_ {1}, \sigma_ {2}) r _ {2} (\sigma_ {2}) \quad \forall \sigma_ {1} \in \Sigma_ {1} \end{array} \tag {5.8}\tag{5.9}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \text { minimize } & v _ {0} \\ \text { subject   to } & v _ {\mathcal {I} _ {1} (\sigma_ {1})} - \sum_ {I ^ {\prime} \in \mathcal {I} _ {1} (\mathrm{Ext} _ {1} (\sigma_ {1}))} v _ {I ^ {\prime}} \geq \sum_ {\sigma_ {2} \in \Sigma_ {2}} g _ {1} (\sigma_ {1}, \sigma_ {2}) r _ {2} (\sigma_ {2}) \quad \forall \sigma_ {1} \in \Sigma_ {1} \end{array} \tag {5.8,5.9}

overrides.expect: P _ {i} (g _ {T} | h _ {t}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if T\leq t ;} \\ \frac {P _ {i} (g _ {T})}{\sum_ {k = t + 1} ^ {\infty} P _ {i} (g _ {k})} & \text {if T > t .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: P_{i}(g_{T} | h_{t}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text{if } T\leq t ; \\ \frac{P_{i}(g_{T})}{\sum_{k = t + 1}^{\infty} P_{i}(g_{k})} & \text{if } T > t . \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text { maximize } & \sum_ {a _ {- i} \in A _ {- i}} \left[ \left(\sum_ {j \in A _ {i}} p _ {j} \cdot u _ {i} (a _ {j}, a _ {- i})\right) - u _ {i} (s _ {i}, a _ {- i}) \right] \\ \text { subject   to } & \sum_ {j \in A _ {i}} p _ {j} u _ {i} (a _ {j}, a _ {- i}) \geq u _ {i} (s _ {i}, a _ {- i}) \quad \forall a _ {- i} \in A _ {- i} \end{array} \tag {4.4}\tag{4.48}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \text{ maximize } & \sum_{a_{- i} \in A_{- i}} \left[ \left(\sum_{j \in A_{i}} p_{j} \cdot u_{i}(a_{j}, a_{- i})\right) - u_{i}(s_{i}, a_{- i}) \right] \\ \text{ subject   to } & \sum_{j \in A_{i}} p_{j} u_{i}(a_{j}, a_{- i}) \geq u_{i}(s_{i}, a_{- i}) \quad \forall a_{- i} \in A_{- i} \end{array} \quad \text{(4.4)}\tag{4.48}
